PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Friedland appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
John Fasesky appeared by zoom.

Mr. Fasesky stated that he is assisting Mr. Friedland, but he does not represent him. Mr. Friedland stated that he has consulted with Mr. Fasesky and that he allows him to speak on his behalf. Mr. Friedland also stated that he is up for following all of the rules with Mr. Fasesky's assistance, that the assets are in three different accounts and that the will stated that he is not required to post a bond. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for January 25, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for March 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Continued To Sep-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
